intent.raw: What people do not understand is how words will become the number.
intent.objective: Refresh the candidate UX and copy so the word-to-record-to-fingerprint-to-later-value-to-range-result chain is visible before participation.
intent.target_artifact: Time Capsule word-to-number mechanism clarity proposal
intent.operator_sentence: Show exactly how a word affects the number.

subagent_strategy.explanation: The correction is narrow, the evidence corpus is bounded, and the operator named the two parent-executed authoring skills.

steps.name: Build correction context
stop_conditions: The exact mechanism, target artifacts, mutation mode, or correction claim lacks evidence.

steps.name: Resolve refresh target inventory
stop_conditions: The prior clarity package cannot be located or distinguished from the approved mechanism source.

steps.name: Author proposal-only refresh deltas
stop_conditions: A proposed delta edits the prior package, chooses production inputs, or replaces the whole form when a mechanism-only delta is sufficient.

steps.name: Compose mechanism-first web copy
stop_conditions: Copy uses letter sums, direct word values, decorative computed outputs, or unexplained mechanism abstractions.

steps.name: Validate correction and preserve human gate
stop_conditions: The proposal claims people understand the chain without first-time retell evidence.

gates.condition: The public chain matches the candidate record, root, later-value, and range-mapping design without letter sums or direct word value.
Proposal-only mode makes no target artifact or HTML mutation.
Every example hash and result is computed from declared invented fixtures and independently reproduced.
First-time readers pass the mechanism thresholds in MECHANISM-CLARITY-DESIGN.md.
Applying target deltas or editing HTML requires explicit approval and Task Session ownership.

state_namespaces.write_policy: Writes limited to the new refresh folder.

state_namespaces.namespace: prior clarity package and current site

promotion_splits.rule: Operator approval, computed fixture proof, and human retell evidence remain separate gates.

promotion_guardrails: Do not present a toy result as ResonantDAO's real or proposed starting supply.
Do not claim comprehension success from authoring or browser evidence.
Do not select production range, public source, cryptographic profile, token result, or launch state.
